PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZABANEH FRED F RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SURPLUS INTERNATIONAL & NATIONAL RESTAURANT SALES GLIMIDAKIS NIKOS AND PARTNER LARA J MARIO AND PARTNER $3,780.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,855.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
